index.title: gongeo.us
index.subtitle: Infinity Nikki Resonance Tracker
index.description: Track Infinity Nikki Resonance History and Statistics

import.choose_method_desc: Choose how you want to import your pull history.
import.file_import_desc: Import from a previously exported nikki-resonance-data file.
import.game_import_desc: Import directly from the game using your browser.
import.login_pearpal_desc: Open Pearpal Website in a new tab and login with your Infold account if you aren't already logged in.
import.get_cookie_desc: Choose how you want to get your cookie data:

console_steps.title: Follow these steps to get your cookie data:
console_steps.step1: Make sure you are logged in and is on Pearpal Website
console_steps.step2: Open your browser's Developer Tools (Press F12 or right-click and select "Inspect")
console_steps.step4: Copy and paste the following code into the console and press enter:
console_steps.step5: If you get a warning saying "Warning: Don't paste code into the devtools console", type "Allow pasting" and hit enter
console_steps.step6: Copy the output text (it should look like the example in the input area below)
console_steps.step7: Come back to gongeo.us, paste the output text in the input area below

manual_steps.title: Follow these steps to manually input your cookie data:
manual_steps.note: (Using Google Chrome as an example, exact names might vary for other browsers but steps will be similar)
manual_steps.step1: Open your browser's Developer Tools (Press F12 or right-click and select "Inspect")
manual_steps.step3: In the left sidebar, expand "Cookies" and select the Pearpal website
manual_steps.step4: Alternatively, you can use a browser extension for cookies like Cookie Editor
manual_steps.step5: Find and copy the values for:
manual_steps.step6: For UID, go to your Pearpal profile and copy your UID number

import.security_note: Note: Never share these cookie values with anyone else!
import.select_banners_desc: No need to re-import if data is already available

common.copyright: © 2025 gongeo.us • © Infold Games All Rights Reserved

disclaimer.title: About this site
disclaimer.content: This is an unofficial fan-made website. It is not affiliated with or endorsed by Infold Games.
disclaimer.rights: All Infinity Nikki game assets, content, and trademarks belong to Infold Games and their respective owners.

clear_confirm.title: Clear Local Data
clear_confirm.content: Are you sure you want to clear all local data? This action cannot be undone.

data_source.question: How are you getting the data?
data_source.answer: We are using the same API as the in-game pull history page to access Infold Games servers that store the banner pull data. To access the data, we need to authenticate with the Infold Games server using your account cookies.

ban_risk.question: Will I get banned for using this?
ban_risk.answer: This is a third-party tool, so there is always some risk, though it is ultimately up to Infold Games. However, similar tools are widely used in other gacha games (Paimon.moe、Star Rail Station、WuWa Tracker etc.) and also in the Chinese community of Infinity Nikki (小黑盒 游创工坊). Take this information as a reference, and make your own judgement.

data_storage.question: What data are you storing?
data_storage.answer: Your pull history is stored locally in your browser, so the next time you visit the site, it will be there unless you clear your browser data. We do not collect any personal information, including the cookies you submitted.

server_data.question: What data is sent to the server?
server_data.answer: Only your pull statistics are sent to help calculate global stats if you opt in. This includes a hashed version of your UID, and the information of 4* and 5* items you pulled.

platform_support.question: Will it work if I play on mobile or PS5?
platform_support.answer: Yes, it does not matter which platform you play on, as long as you log into the Pearpal website on PC using the same account. If you want to do the import on mobile, you will need a browser extension to access cookies, since Developer Tools are not available on mobile, although it is possible to import using Firefox on Android, the process is not user-friendly thus not recommended.

cookie_script.question: Do I have to run a script to get my cookies?
cookie_script.answer: No, you can get them manually. Open Dev Tools, go to Application > Cookies > https://pearpal.infoldgames.com/, and look for the cookie names you need. Check manual input instructions in the import page for more details.

no_pulls.question: All banners were processed, but no pulls are showing?
no_pulls.answer: Please check that your region and cookie values are correct. Make sure the UID and ID from the cookies are not mixed up.

auto_update.question: Will the data auto update?
auto_update.answer: No, you will need to redo the import process for new banners only if you keep your data in browser or local storage. The website will also need to update to support data for new banners. Additionally, for security reasons, the cookie will likely expire after some time.

export.question: How can I export my pull history?
export.answer: You can export your pull history as a PNG image or a JSON file. If your browser data is cleared, you can use the JSON file to restore your history.

infinityNikkiAssets.title: Platform and Content Disclaimer
infinityNikkiAssets.content: gongeo.us is an independent fan-operated platform and is not affiliated, endorsed, or partnered with Infinity Nikki or Infold Games. All official game assets, visuals, and related content are the exclusive property of Infold Games and are used here solely for community sharing and educational purposes. We do not claim any ownership or rights over this content.
infinityNikkiAssets.acknowledgment: By using this platform, you acknowledge its unofficial status and accept all risks associated with accessing third-party or unofficial content.

dataAndStats.title: Data and Statistics Disclaimer
dataAndStats.content: All gameplay statistics and data presented on gongeo.us are voluntarily contributed by users and are not sourced from Infold Games. These data sets represent only a small portion of the player community and may not fully reflect overall player behavior or game trends.
dataAndStats.insights: Any insights or conclusions drawn from the data are for informational purposes only and should be considered in light of their community-driven nature.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: gongeo.us is an independent fan project. All trademarks, game content, and intellectual property related to Infinity Nikki remain the sole property of Infold Games and their licensors.
intellectualProperty.siteContent: Except where explicitly stated otherwise, all original code, site design, and custom assets on this platform are owned by gongeo.us and protected by applicable copyright and intellectual property laws. Unauthorized copying, reuse, or distribution is prohibited without written permission.
intellectualProperty.usage: This platform is provided "as-is" and intended solely for personal, non-commercial use.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection and Storage
dataCollection.content: We collect only minimal data necessary to operate our service. We do not collect or store any personal information or tracking cookies. Any cookies and UID you provide are transmitted solely to Infold Games' servers to verify your account and retrieve your pull history.
dataCollection.pullHistory: Your pull history data is stored locally in your browser. If you opt in to share data, your pull statistics—including a hashed version of your UID and details of 4-star and 5-star items pulled—will be used to calculate community-wide statistics.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.content: All user data is stored locally within your browser. While we take reasonable security measures, please be aware that no internet transmission can be guaranteed as completely secure.

analytics.title: Analytics and Tracking
analytics.content: We utilize GoatCounter, a privacy-focused analytics service, to monitor website usage. It collects only anonymized information such as page views, referrer URLs, and basic browser data without using cookies or personal identifiers. This data helps us improve your experience. For more information, please see GoatCounter's privacy policy.

maintenance.title: Under Maintenance
maintenance.message: We're currently performing some maintenance on our site to improve your experience.
maintenance.status: We'll be back online shortly. Thank you for your patience!
